# 01-prerequisites: Verify SDK and baseline build

## Objective
Confirm .NET 9 SDK is available and the project builds cleanly on net8.0.

## Findings
- .NET 9 SDK available: ✅ (9.0.312 installed)
- Baseline build: ✅ 0 errors, 0 warnings
- Project: SimpleWebApp/SimpleWebApp.csproj targeting net8.0
- No NuGet packages to restore beyond implicit SDK packages
